product_updates.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
product_updates.content: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

product_updates.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
product_updates.content: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

product_updates.title: Google now lets you direct avatars through prompts in its Vids app
product_updates.content: Google is adding a way to customize and instruct avatars for video creation in the Vids app.

technical_breakthroughs.title: New Rowhammer attacks give complete control of machines running Nvidia GPUs
technical_breakthroughs.content: Both GDDRHammer and GeForge hammer GPU memory in ways that compromise the CPU.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
technical_breakthroughs.content: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: plastic’s problem with fuel prices, and SpaceX’s blockbuster IPO
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Fuel prices are soaring. Plastic could be next. As the war in Iran continues, one of the most visible global economic ripple effects has been fossil-fuel price…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Fuel prices are soaring. Plastic could be next.
technical_breakthroughs.content: As the war in Iran continues to engulf the Middle East and the Strait of Hormuz stays closed, one of the most visible global economic ripple effects has been fossil-fuel prices. In particular, you can’t get away from news about the price of gasoline, which just topped an average of $4 a gallon in…
